title: Reclaim Your Time with AI
subtitle: Workflow automation for small businesses
tagline: Setup in a day. ROI in a week. Your team stays in charge.
hero_concept: A clean modern office with a laptop showing a dashboard of automation workflows, soft daylight, minimalist aesthetic

contact.name: Chen Wei, Customer Success
contact.address: Remote-first · Headquartered in San Francisco, CA

sections.heading: What Gets Automated
sections.lead_paragraph: We start with the five tasks every small business repeats daily — and let your team focus on the work only humans can do.
bullets: Meeting notes synced to your CRM

sections.heading: How We Deliver
sections.lead_paragraph: No generic templates. Every workflow is tuned to the tools you already use and the voice your customers trust.
bullets: Week 2 — build and test in sandbox
Week 3 — go live with your team

sections.heading: What You'll See
sections.lead_paragraph: Most clients see 8 to 12 hours saved per week within the first month. We track it and show you.
bullets: Error rate on manual tasks near zero
Clear ROI calculator in your account

back_panel.heading: Let's map your workflow
back_panel.body: A free 30-minute session where we sketch three automations tailored to your business and hand you the plan.
